steps.name: Set start and end date: 04-08-2025 to 04-08-2025
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click 'Export table data to file' button
Get all transactions displayed in the UI table
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Read and parse transactions from PDF text
